name.en: All rail transit lines in Paris
name.zh: 巴黎所有轨道交通线路

desc.en:
This map covers all Paris Metro lines, all tram lines except Line 13 and Line 14, all regional express rail lines, all commuter rail lines except Line V, as well as the airport shuttle to Orly Airport.
Tram Line 13, Line 14 and commuter rail Line V are not drawn because they are located far from central Paris and cannot be displayed within the map’s boundary.
desc.zh:
这张图涵盖巴黎全部地铁线路、除13号线和14号线外的所有有轨电车线路、全部区域快速铁路线路、除V线以外的所有通勤铁路，以及通往奥利机场的机场捷运。
有轨电车13号线、14号线和通勤铁路V线并未绘制，原因是它们距离巴黎市中心过远，无法在本图的绘制范围内呈现。

updateHistory.reason: This map covers all Paris Metro lines, all tram lines except Line 13 and Line 14, all regional express rail lines, all commuter rail lines except Line V, as well as the airport shuttle to Orly Airport. Tram Line 13, Line 14 and commuter rail Line V are not drawn because they are located far from central Paris and cannot be displayed within the map boundary.
